intellect_insights.title: DG CPL Much Higher Than Search
intellect_insights.observation: DG CPL ₹1930 is 50%+ higher than Search CPL ₹1131
intellect_insights.recommendation: Audit DG audiences, refresh creatives, trim bottom 30% audiences

intellect_insights.title: Budget Overspend Without Proportional Leads
intellect_insights.observation: Spend pacing at 412% but leads only at 211% — diminishing returns
intellect_insights.recommendation: Reduce budgets on campaigns with CPL > 1.4x target. Reallocate to efficient performers.

intellect_insights.title: CPL Exceeds Alert Threshold — Check Day-Parting
intellect_insights.recommendation: Pull hourly/day-of-week report from Google Ads UI. Reduce bids or pause ad schedule during high-CPL hours (typically weekends for B2B).

intellect_insights.title: DG Conversion Rate Critically Low
intellect_insights.observation: DG CVR 0.6% is less than half of Search CVR 8.6%
intellect_insights.recommendation: Audit DG landing pages. Consider DG-specific landing pages with softer CTAs (webinar, guide) vs hard lead form.

recommendations.detail: 2 ad groups in 'DM_Branded_Search_11th_June_2024 #d2r|dt7-dm_branded_search_11th_june_2024' with <50 weekly impressions each. Combined: 531 impressions, 10.948986999999999 conversions, ₹11,533 spend. Too fragmented for smart bidding to optimize.
recommendations.action: Merge 2 low-volume ad groups into one. Consolidates conversion data for better bidding signals. Combine best-performing keywords and ad copy from each.
recommendations.expected_impact: More conversion data per ad group -> exits learning limited faster, better bid optimization
recommendations.execution_note: Requires merging keywords, ad copy, and pausing old ad groups

recommendations.detail: QS spread of 3 (min 7, max 10) across 6 keywords. Low-QS keywords drag down ad rank and inflate CPC for the entire ad group.
recommendations.action: Segregate into two ad groups: (1) High-QS group (amara deevyashakti, amara rajendra nagar, deevyashakti amara) (2) Low-QS group (deevyashakti, amara gaganpahad, deevyashakti amara rajendra nagar) — write dedicated ad copy for each to improve ad relevance and expected CTR.
recommendations.expected_impact: QS improvement of 1-2 pts on low-QS keywords, leading to lower CPC and better IS
recommendations.execution_note: Requires manual keyword migration and new ad copy creation
